differential_diagnoses: Systemic onset juvenile idiopathic arthritis / Adult-onset Still's disease
next_steps: Obtain thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4, total T3)
Perform thyroid ultrasound with color Doppler flow
Measure erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR) and C-reactive protein (CRP) trending
Perform fine-needle aspiration (FNA) of the thyroid if nodule persists or inflammatory markers remain high
Obtain radioactive iodine uptake (RAIU) scan (if indicated by low TSH)
Consider CT neck with improved technique or MRI for better visualization of thyroid pathology
